title: stipa miliacea
intro: Stipa miliacea, also known as Mile High Grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Stipa miliacea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
